summary: Verified /licenses page bug fixes. All 3 cert logos (APEDA, FSSAI, DGFT) render correctly with correct src paths, all images return HTTP 200, and tile containers have no visible border (borderWidth 0px) and transparent backgroundColor (rgba(0,0,0,0)). All 4 regressions verified: no 'Compliance' overline, H1 exactly 'Certified for Excellence.', paragraph present, and only the 3-logo strip between paragraph and footer.

issues: DGFT logo PNG has a small white rectangular background baked into the source image (not a CSS border). Expected per request note — flagged for awareness, not a failure.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified at 1600x900. Tiles data-testid cert-tile-apeda/fssai/dgft each have borderWidth 0px, borderStyle solid (no visible border), backgroundColor rgba(0,0,0,0). Image HTTP status verified via in-browser fetch (urllib returns 403 due to CDN bot filter — use page.evaluate fetch for status checks).
